Morpho launches fixed-rate lending protocol Midnight on Base to expand onchain credit markets
news.summary: Morpho has launched Midnight, a fixed-rate, fixed-term lending protocol on Base that complements its existing variable-rate lending protocol.

news.title: Robinhood Chain tops $430 million in TVL, FalconX sees RWAs as the key differentiator
news.summary: Robinhood Chain hit $431M TVL and 250K+ daily users in under three weeks, but memecoins account for 80% of its $9B DEX volume, FalconX says.

news.title: Galaxy Commits Up to $5 Million to Prepare Bitcoin for Quantum Threat
news.summary: The crypto firm's initiative arrives as researchers, exchanges, and the U.S. government warn that "Q-Day" may land as soon as 2030.

news.title: Morning Minute: The Clarity Act Has New Life
news.summary: Odds of the Clarity Act passing in 2026 jumped to 42% after a surprising new development from the White House.

news.title: Pakistan Launches Crypto Investigation Unit to Fight Money Laundering
news.summary: Islamabad is building the enforcement side of its crypto push, standing up a unit to police money laundering even as it licenses exchanges.

news.title: Tether-backed Twenty One, Strike merger plan scrapped: Bloomberg
news.summary: Strike will remain a standalone company after the proposed three-way merger was scrapped, while Twenty One Capital and Elektron continue discussions, Bloomberg reported.

news.title: More MiCA-licensed crypto firms could exit EU market: Gate Europe CEO
news.summary: Gate Europe’s Giovanni Cunti says some MiCA-licensed crypto firms may struggle to sustain compliance costs as Europe enters its new regulatory era.

news.title: Russian parliament passes law regulating crypto market
news.summary: The State Duma legislation creates a regulated framework for crypto market participants and now moves to President Vladimir Putin for his signature before becoming law.

news.title: 金色晚报 | 7月21日晚间重要动态一览
news.summary:
【金色晚报 | 7月21日晚间重要动态一览】12:00-21:00关键词：长鑫科技、Token工厂、中际旭创、Kalshi 
1.国家超算互联网上线Kimi K3 API服务 
2.长鑫科技：网上投资者放弃认购6,586,227股 
3.全球代币化股票总市值在6月底达到约17亿美元 
4.中美计划9月举行AI会谈，讨论前沿模型监管风险 
5.美国总统特朗普最快将于本周内对数十个国家实施新的关税 
6.北京：将布局建设Token工厂 力争下半年新增智能算力5万P 
7.摩根大通：韩国股市去杠杆进程已完成75%，继续维持“超配”评级 
8.中际旭创香港上市拟以每股最高1010港元发售股票，筹资至少80亿美元 
9.美国华盛顿州法院发布针对Kalshi的初步禁令，认定其开展的业务违反华盛顿州赌博法

news.title: 芯片股反弹盖过伊朗局势担忧 美股期货走高
news.summary: 【芯片股反弹盖过伊朗局势担忧 美股期货走高】金色财经报道，7月21日，美国股指期货周二上涨，AI产业链核心芯片股反弹，暂时盖过美伊冲突再度升级带来的市场压力。标普500指数期货和纳斯达克100指数期货盘中上涨，三星电子和台积电股价走高，带动科技股情绪回暖。追踪半导体公司的交易所交易基金上涨4.3%。此前日经新闻报道称，全球最大晶圆代工企业台积电计划从2027年起将部分芯片制造服务价格上调最多10%，以应对原材料、设备和海外建厂成本上升。盘前交易中，多数大型科技股上涨，特斯拉和英伟达领涨，AMD、英特尔、美光科技等芯片企业也走高。此前，受市场担忧AI相关股票估值涨幅过快影响，芯片股和AI概念股连续数周承压。
